nodes.name: ChinhSach.html
nodes.summary: Privacy policy page for the Vietnamese Driving License Exam app, displayed in a WebView. Contains 7 sections covering data collection practices, local-only storage, device permissions, absence of third-party SDKs, and a contact email address.

nodes.name: practice_exam.html
nodes.summary: Interactive two-tab WebView page presenting driving exam study material: a theory tab (Ly thuyet) with key traffic-law cards covering speed limits, road signs, right-of-way rules, and license categories, and a driving-course tab (Sa hinh) with step-by-step guides for all 11 B2 practical exam exercises. Uses a swipeable slider with JavaScript-driven tab synchronization.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes inline JavaScript functions goTo() and setActive() to synchronize a CSS scroll-snap slider with a fixed tab bar, enabling swipe and tap navigation without a framework.

nodes.name: tips600.html
nodes.summary: Comprehensive driving exam tips and study guide loaded in a WebView, presenting step-by-step instructions for all 11 B2 driving-course exercises (sa hinh) with error penalties, along with general advice on clutch and brake technique. Uses Bootstrap for layout and jQuery/Bootstrap JS for in-page navigation.
nodes.languageNotes: References local assets bootstrap.min.css, jquery.min.js, and bootstrap.min.js via relative paths, expecting these files to be present alongside it in the assets/html directory. Uses non-standard HTML element name <tieuDe> instead of <title>.
